name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES state, N
(* Type definition for state *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ N ∈ Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all processes idle *)
Init == 
    /\ N ∈ Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Transition for a single process p *)

    /\ p ∈ 1..N
    /\ state[p] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
    \/ state[p] = "trying"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
    \/ state[p] = "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next state: exactly one process changes state *)
Next == 
    \E p \in 1..N : Process(p)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical *)
MutualExclusionInv == 
    \A p, q \in 1..N : 
        /\ p /= q
        => ~(state[p] = "critical" /\ state[q] = "critical")

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state /\ MutualExclusionInv

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, messages, votes
PrepareState == "Prepare"
VoteYesState == "VoteYes"
VoteNoState == "VoteNo"
CommitState == "Commit"
AbortState == "Abort"

\* Message types
PrepareMsg(p) == << "Prepare", p >>
VoteYesMsg(p) == << "VoteYes", p >>
VoteNoMsg(p) == << "VoteNo", p >>
CommitMsg == << "Commit" >>
AbortMsg == << "Abort" >>

\* Initial state
Init ==
    /\ participants = {1, 2, 3, 4} \* Example set of participants
    /\ coordinator = 0
    /\ state = [i \in participants \cup {coordinator} |-> PrepareState]
    /\ messages = << >>
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "Pending"]

\* Sending a message
Send(msg) ==
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, msg)
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, coordinator, state, votes >>

\* Receiving a message
Receive(msg) ==
    /\ messages' = SubSeq(messages, 1, Len(messages) - 1)
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, coordinator, state, votes >>

\* Coordinator actions
CoordinatorPrepare ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = PrepareState
    /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = PrepareState
        /\ Send(PrepareMsg(p))
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = CommitState]
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, votes >>

CoordinatorCommit ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = VoteYesState
        /\ Send(CommitMsg)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = CommitState]
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, votes >>

CoordinatorAbort ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = VoteNoState
        /\ Send(AbortMsg)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = AbortState]
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, votes >>

\* Participant actions
ParticipantPrepare(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = PrepareState
    /\ Receive(PrepareMsg(p))
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = VoteYesState]
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, coordinator, messages >>

ParticipantVoteNo(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = PrepareState
    /\ Receive(PrepareMsg(p))
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = VoteNoState]
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, coordinator, messages >>

ParticipantCommit(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = VoteYesState
    /\ Receive(CommitMsg)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = CommitState]
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, coordinator, votes, messages >>

ParticipantAbort(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = VoteNoState
    /\ Receive(AbortMsg)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = AbortState]
    /\ UNCHANGED << participants, coordinator, votes, messages >>

\* Next-state relation
Next ==
    \/ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = PrepareState
        /\ \E msg \in messages :
            /\ msg = PrepareMsg(p)
            /\ ParticipantPrepare(p)
    \/ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = PrepareState
        /\ \E msg \in messages :
            /\ msg = PrepareMsg(p)
            /\ ParticipantVoteNo(p)
    \/ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = VoteYesState
        /\ \E msg \in messages :
            /\ msg = CommitMsg
            /\ ParticipantCommit(p)
    \/ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = VoteNoState
        /\ \E msg \in messages :
            /\ msg = AbortMsg
            /\ ParticipantAbort(p)
    \/ /\ state[coordinator] = PrepareState
        /\ \E p \in participants :
            /\ state[p] = PrepareState
            /\ Send(PrepareMsg(p))
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = CommitState]
        /\ UNCHANGED << participants, votes >>
    \/ /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
        /\ \E p \in participants :
            /\ state[p] = VoteYesState
            /\ Send(CommitMsg)
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = CommitState]
        /\ UNCHANGED << participants, votes >>
    \/ /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
        /\ \E p \in participants :
            /\ state[p] = VoteNoState
            /\ Send(AbortMsg)
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = AbortState]
        /\ UNCHANGED << participants, votes >>

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<< participants, coordinator, state, messages, votes >>

\* Type invariant
TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \subseteq Nat
    /\ coordinator \in Nat
    /\ state \in [participants \cup {coordinator} -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
    /\ messages \in Seq([msg -> {"Prepare")
    /\ votes \in [participants -> {"Pending", "Yes", "No"}]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC, Integers

CONSTANT N \* Number of philosophers and forks

VARIABLES forks, state

(* fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means free *)
(* philosopher state: state[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

(* Helper to get left and right fork indices for philosopher i *)
LEFT(i) == (i - 1) % N
RIGHT(i) == i

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> -1]
        /\ state = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Predicate: philosopher i can start eating *)
CanEat(i) == /\ state[i] = "hungry"
              /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = -1
              /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = -1

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
           /\ forks' = forks

(* Action: philosopher i starts eating *)
StartEating(i) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i stops eating and puts down forks *)
StopEating(i) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = -1, ![RIGHT(i)] = -1]
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 0..N-1:
          (state[i] = "thinking" /\ Hungry(i))
        \/ (CanEat(i) /\ StartEating(i))
        \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ StopEating(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [0..N-1 -> 0..N-1 \cup {-1}]
          /\ state \in [0..N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number
*)

(* The set of process identifiers *)
ProcessIds == 1..N

(* Initialization: all tickets are 0 and no process is choosing *)
Init == /\ num \in [ProcessIds -> 0]
        /\ flag \in [ProcessIds -> FALSE]

(* Choosing phase: process i sets flag[i] to TRUE *)
Choosing(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
               /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
               /\ UNCHANGED num

(* Numbering phase: process i assigns a ticket number *)
Numbering(i) == /\ flag[i] = TRUE
               /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + MAX(num[ProcessIds])]
               /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
               /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Entering the critical section: process i waits until all
   processes with smaller numbers have exited *)
Entering(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
               /\ num[i] > 0
               /\ \A j \in ProcessIds :
                    j /= i
                    => (num[j] = 0 \/ num[j] > num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j > i))
               /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Exiting the critical section: process i resets its ticket *)
Exiting(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
              /\ num[i] > 0
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
              /\ UNCHANGED flag

(* Next-state relation: any process can be in any phase *)
Next == \E i \in ProcessIds :
          (Choosing(i) \/ Numbering(i) \/ Entering(i) \/ Exiting(i))

(* Type invariant: num and flag have correct types *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [ProcessIds -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [ProcessIds -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>> /\ TypeOK

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, each element is a Nat or the special value "EMPTY" *)
(* head and tail are indices into q, ranging from 0 to K-1 *)
(* size is the number of elements currently in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
    /\ K \in Nat
    /\ K > 0
    /\ q \in [0..K-1 -> {"EMPTY"} \cup Nat]
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K
    /\ \A i \in 0..K-1: 
        /\ q[i] \in Nat \/ q[i] = "EMPTY"

Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> "EMPTY"]
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q[tail] = "EMPTY"
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1] \* Example: produce value 1
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q[head] \in Nat
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = "EMPTY"]
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
    ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == 
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* --type definitions-- *)
StateType == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
ServerId == 1..3

(* --initialization-- *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in ServerId |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in ServerId |-> "Follower"]

(* --state transitions-- *)
FollowerToCandidate(s) == /\ state[s] = "Follower"
                         /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
                         /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
                         /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
                         /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

CandidateToLeader(s) == /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
                       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* --vote request handling-- *)
VoteRequest(s, t, v) == /\ state[s] = "Follower"
                        /\ t >= currentTerm
                        /\ (votedFor[s] = NULL \/ votedFor[s] = v)
                        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]
                        /\ currentTerm' = t
                        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = v]
                        /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* --next state-- *)
Next == \E s \in ServerId :
          FollowerToCandidate(s)
        \/ CandidateToLeader(s)
        \/ VoteRequest(s, currentTerm, NULL)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* --type invariant-- *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in [ServerId -> (ServerId \cup {NULL})]
          /\ state \in [ServerId -> StateType]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* Readers can enter if no writer is active *)
ReaderEnter == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

(* Readers can exit *)
ReaderExit == 
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

(* Writer can enter if no readers and no writer *)
WriterEnter == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Writer can exit *)
WriterExit == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \/ ReaderEnter
  \/ ReaderExit
  \/ WriterEnter
  \/ WriterExit

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \in Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES procState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotRecorded
CONSTANTS N, ProcIds, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState, MESSAGE_TYPES

\* Helper definitions
IsChannel(i, j) == i \in ProcIds /\ j \in ProcIds /\ i # j
Channel(i, j) == [i \in ProcIds, j \in ProcIds |-> IsChannel(i, j)]

\* Initial state
Init ==
    /\ procState = [i \in ProcIds |-> InitState]
    /\ channelState = [i \in ProcIds, j \in ProcIds |-> IF IsChannel(i, j) THEN InitChannelState ELSE <<>>]
    /\ markerSent = [i \in ProcIds, j \in ProcIds |-> IF IsChannel(i, j) THEN FALSE ELSE FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [i \in ProcIds, j \in ProcIds |-> IF IsChannel(i, j) THEN FALSE ELSE FALSE]
    /\ snapshotRecorded = [i \in ProcIds |-> FALSE]

\* Sending a marker along channel (i,j)
SendMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ IsChannel(i, j)
    /\ markerSent[i][j] = FALSE
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channelState[i][j], "marker")]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerReceived, snapshotRecorded>>

\* Receiving a marker on channel (i,j)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ IsChannel(i, j)
    /\ markerReceived[i][j] = FALSE
    /\ channelState[i][j] = <<>> \/ <<"marker">> \/ <<"marker", rest>>  \* Marker is at head
    /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Rest(channelState[i][j])]
    /\ IF snapshotRecorded[i] = FALSE THEN
           /\ snapshotRecorded' = [snapshotRecorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
           /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = "snapshot_state_of_i"]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent, markerReceived>>

           /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

\* Receiving a normal message on channel (i,j)
ReceiveMessage(i, j, msg) ==
    /\ IsChannel(i, j)
    /\ markerReceived[i][j] = TRUE
    /\ channelState[i][j] = <<msg, rest>>
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Rest(channelState[i][j])]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotRecorded>>

\* Sending a normal message from i to j
SendMessage(i, j, msg) ==
    /\ IsChannel(i, j)
    /\ markerSent[i][j] = TRUE
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channelState[i][j], msg)]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotRecorded>>

\* Next-state relation
Next ==
    \/ \E i, j \in ProcIds : SendMarker(i, j)
    \/ \E i, j \in ProcIds : ReceiveMarker(i, j)
    \/ \E i, j \in ProcIds, msg \in MESSAGE_TYPES : ReceiveMessage(i, j, msg)
    \/ \E i, j \in ProcIds, msg \in MESSAGE_TYPES : SendMessage(i, j, msg)

\* Specification
Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotRecorded>>

\* Type invariant
TypeOK ==
    /\ procState \in [ProcIds -> InitState]
    /\ channelState \in [ProcIds, ProcIds -> Seq(MESSAGE_TYPES)]
    /\ markerSent \in [ProcIds, ProcIds -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [ProcIds, ProcIds -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ snapshotRecorded \in [ProcIds -> BOOLEAN]

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES tokenPos, messages

(* Constants *)
CONSTANT N

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ tokenPos \in 1..N
          /\ messages \in [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ tokenPos = 1
        /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> <<>>]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ tokenPos' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
          /\ messages' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN
                                         IF messages[i] = <<>> THEN <<>>

                                              [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN Tail(messages[i])




Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<tokenPos, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

(* The store is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store \in [Keys -> Values] /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Put operation: updates the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: reads the value for a key *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
           /\ store' = store

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
      \/ \E k \in Keys : Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, M, Values
VARIABLES acceptors, chosenValue, proposers


(* Helper definitions *)
acceptor(i) == acceptors[i]
proposer(j) == proposers[j]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> None, promised |-> 0]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, promised |-> 0, accepted |-> 0]]
    /\ chosenValue = None

(* Prepare/Promise phase *)
Prepare(j, b) ==
    /\ proposers[j].ballot = b
    /\ proposers[j].promised = 0
    /\ proposers[j].accepted = 0
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptor(i)']
    /\ acceptor(i)' = [acceptor(i) EXCEPT !.promised = Max(acceptor(i).promised, b)]
    /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![j].promised = b]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chosenValue>>

(* Accept/Accepted phase *)
Accept(j, b, v) ==
    /\ proposers[j].ballot = b
    /\ proposers[j].promised = b
    /\ proposers[j].accepted = 0
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptor(i)']
    /\ acceptor(i)' = [acceptor(i) EXCEPT !.ballot = b, !.value = v, !.promised = Max(acceptor(i).promised, b)]
    /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![j].accepted = 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chosenValue>>

(* Once a value is chosen, it is never changed *)
Chosen(v) ==
    /\ chosenValue = None
    /\ \E i \in 1..N : acceptor(i).value = v
    /\ chosenValue' = v

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E j \in 1..M : \E b \in Nat :
        /\ b > proposers[j].ballot
        /\ Prepare(j, b)
    \/ \E j \in 1..M : \E b \in Nat : \E v \in Values :
        /\ b = proposers[j].ballot
        /\ b > proposers[j].promised
        /\ Accept(j, b, v)
    \/ \E v \in Values :
        Chosen(v)

(* Specification *)
Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosenValue>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N |-> [ballot |-> Nat, value |-> Values \cup {None}, promised |-> Nat]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M |-> [ballot |-> Nat, promised |-> Nat, accepted |-> Nat]]
    /\ chosenValue \in Values \cup {None}

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES channelState, currentChunkIndex, fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

TypeOK == /\ sentChunks \in Seq(Seq(Nat))
        /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
        /\ currentChunkIndex \in Nat
        /\ channelState \in {"OK", "LOST"}

Init == /\ fileChunks \in Seq(Seq(Nat))
        /\ sentChunks = <<>>
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ currentChunkIndex = 1
        /\ channelState = "OK"

SendChunk == /\ channelState = "OK"
           /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, fileChunks[currentChunkIndex])
           /\ retransmitCount' = 0
           /\ currentChunkIndex' = currentChunkIndex + 1
           /\ channelState' = "OK"

RetransmitChunk == /\ channelState = "LOST"
                 /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
                 /\ channelState' = "OK"

Next == \/ /\ currentChunkIndex <= Len(fileChunks)
           /\ channelState = "OK"
           /\ SendChunk
      \/ /\ currentChunkIndex <= Len(fileChunks)
           /\ channelState = "LOST"
           /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
           /\ RetransmitChunk
      \/ /\ currentChunkIndex <= Len(fileChunks)
           /\ channelState = "LOST"
           /\ retransmitCount >= MAX_RETRIES
           /\ channelState' = "OK"
           /\ retransmitCount' = 0
           /\ currentChunkIndex' = currentChunkIndex + 1
           /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, fileChunks[currentChunkIndex])

Spec == /\ TypeOK
       /\ Init
       /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunkIndex, channelState>>

====
